assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands for current versions, cluster health, node status, and pod status

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 1.3 includes 'gcloud container get-server-config' command to check available master versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: No API deprecation check command is provided - this is critical for version upgrades as deprecated APIs can break workloads

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 2.1 provides exact command with --master and --cluster-version flags for control plane upgrade

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 2.2 includes verification commands to check master version and test connectivity, though expected output format could be more specific

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 3.1 and 3.4 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools, though skip-level upgrade option is not mentioned

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 3.2 and 3.5 include 'watch kubectl get nodes' and pod monitoring commands to track upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Only provides direct 1.32→1.33 upgrade, does not mention or provide option for skip-level node pool upgrades which can be more efficient

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive validation with commands for node versions, pod health, and kube-system pod checks

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes rollback plan section with commands for scaling down workloads and restoring configurations, plus troubleshooting section
